description:
# Google Calendar Integration

Optional Google Calendar OAuth integration. Read-only sync of Google Calendar events into the calendar view. Follows the Linear OAuth pattern exactly.

## Phases
1. Google OAuth types and server routes
2. Google Calendar sync service
3. Google Calendar settings UI
title: [Epic] Google Calendar Integration
